statement: In every magma, Equation 3819 (`x * y = (z * z) * (x * x)`) implies Equation 3957 (`x * y = (y * (x * z)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0800
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op z z) (op x x))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op x z)) x)
